Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates the presence of "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia" as one of the diagnoses. This diagnosis is a clear indication of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is explicitly noted, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in their next hospital visit, as it suggests ongoing management or monitoring of their lipid levels.
